headline: AMD Stock Hits Record Highs – Is It Too Late To Buy?
summary: While AMD (AMD) recently breached record highs in April 2026, many investors viewing the stock’s 100x trailing multiple conclude the valuation is unsustainable. (See AMD valuation metrics.
